# Package Reality Check

> Check that dependencies actually exist and are legit on npm and PyPI. Catches AI-hallucinated packages and typosquats before install.

## Tool

- [Package Reality Check](https://jaydenyoonzk.github.io/package-reality-check/): the tool itself, a static page that runs entirely in the browser with no accounts and no data collection

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/package-reality-check#readme): what the tool does, how it works, and its engineering notes
- [Changelog](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/package-reality-check/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): dated release history

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/package-reality-check): MIT licensed source code
